DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS IGOR PASKHOVER, VLADIMIR SYELSKY'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts to support alter ego liability, to allege in good faith and support by facts date of unauthorized sublet prior to the expiration of the guarantee, and facts in support of each element of fraud cause of action. If Plaintiff is alleging both misrepresentation and concealment, these causes of action shall be separately alleged and supported by facts. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
